setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which query CouchDB at this exact endpoint.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated inventory item data injected via setup scripts. The target item name is 'Sterile Gauze Pads (4x4 inch)', the target quantity to request is 25, and the expected request status is 'Requested', all of which exactly match the task description instructions and verifier logic. The backend CouchDB URL is confirmed as http://couchadmin:test@localhost:5984/main.
